untranslatable_reason: Signal requires half-life calculation of price series and continuous proportional position sizing based on deviation magnitude. Half-life is not an allowed indicator and requires statistical computation (mean-reversion half-life via Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process or ADF regression) not available in the allowed indicator set. Continuous proportional position sizing cannot be expressed as discrete entry/exit conditions. Approximated with simple mean-reversion using SMA as a proxy, but this does not capture the core logic of deviation-proportional sizing.
translation_notes: This signal describes a sophisticated continuous mean-reversion strategy with position sizing proportional to price deviations from a dynamically calculated mean-reversion half-life. The allowed indicator set does not support: (1) half-life calculations, (2) deviation magnitude measurements for proportional position sizing, or (3) continuous/incremental position adjustments. A basic approximation using SMA crossovers has been provided, but it fundamentally does not implement the author's intended strategy. Manual implementation with custom indicators required.
